appDescription: Enterprise-grade Chrome extension starter powered by WXT, Vue 3, TypeScript, Pinia, and Element Plus.

popup.description: Popup keeps a lightweight workflow with its own router and Pinia instance.
popup.homeDescription: Shared state is synchronized through WXT storage, while this popup owns its own navigation tree.
popup.settingsHint: WXT i18n follows the browser locale. Change the browser language to switch translations.

options.aboutDescription: This starter uses native WXT i18n, per-entry router instances, and isolated Pinia roots.
options.currentLocaleHint: The current translation locale comes from browser.i18n / @wxt-dev/i18n.
options.title: Extension Options

sidepanel.overviewDescription: The side panel is a dedicated SPA with its own router and state container.
sidepanel.toolsDescription: Use this view to inspect shared theme and counter state across contexts.

content.description: Mounted in Shadow DOM with an isolated Vue app.
content.title: Content Widget
